# Daily Report — 2026-06-05

## Task Completed
Added `update_ci_outage` tool (PATCH cmdb_ci_outage/{sys_id}). Allows callers to
update any combination of fields on an existing CI outage record: type, begin/end
datetime, short_description, cause_ci, resolved state, and resolution_notes. Guards
against empty-body calls (no fields provided). Returns the normalised outage record
on success with a 404 guard for missing records.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1413
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing vulnerabilities in transitive/system dependencies (pyjwt, setuptools,
urllib3, wheel). No new vulnerabilities introduced.

## Files Changed
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/cmdb_tools.py — added UpdateCIOutageParams model and update_ci_outage function
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py — exported update_ci_outage
- src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py — imported and registered update_ci_outage
- config/tool_packages.yaml — added update_ci_outage to system_administrator and full packages
- tests/test_cmdb_ci_outage_tools.py — 19 new tests for UpdateCIOutageParams and update_ci_outage (70 total in file)

## Next Up
Add delete_ci_outage tool (DELETE cmdb_ci_outage/{sys_id})
